base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_bow — a pickup_item (weapon_pickup) from 1986 legend of zelda. Bow — weapon item, uses bombs-slot-1. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bow — weapon item, uses bombs-slot-1; fires arrows from rupee-inventory
